stemHtml: When a flight crew reports information after a flight, it must be submitted to the AIS when it refers to…

options.a: The state or operation of air navigation services or items to report to the Safety Investigation Authority (SIA).
options.b: Inaccuracies in the Airline Operational Manual (AOM) or state or operation of air navigation facilities.
options.c: The state or operation of air navigation facilities or the presence of wildlife hazards.
options.d: The presence of birds or inaccuracies in the Airline Operational Manual (AOM).
